aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some foundational elements in place, such as a clear website structure and schema markup. However, there are significant gaps in customer engagement and online reputation.
quick_wins: Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build online reputation.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords related to HVAC services in Georgetown, Texas.
Implement a blog section to regularly publish relevant content and improve SEO.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile (GBP) was not found, indicating that the business may not have claimed or set up their GBP.
critical_issues: No GBP found, which is crucial for local search visibility.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The business has some level of NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) consistency across the web, but there is room for improvement in citation quality and quantity.
action_items: Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online platforms.
Seek out niche citation opportunities specific to the HVAC industry.

schema_gaps: Product schema for HVAC services and products offered.
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.
FAQ schema to address common customer queries about HVAC services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of online reputation and customer engagement.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Customers searching for HVAC services in Georgetown, Texas, due to the absence of a GBP and limited online presence.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up and optimizing a Google Business Profile to improve local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content that establishes the business as an authority in the HVAC industry.
